annotation: Grok eval cases updated on 2026-07-20 for dual-route fallback, priority full text, and HTML delivery gates.

evals.name: guide_only_deep_research_startup
evals.prompt: 我这里有一份科研项目指南，先别问我太多问题，请你根据指南自动拆解关键词、识别3个候选研究方向，并选择一个最优方向，启动科研申请书深研工作流。指南内容如下：某专项重点支持面向复杂环境的智能感知、可信决策与自主协同控制基础理论研究，鼓励交叉融合人工智能、机器人、信息物理系统和安全保障技术，形成可验证、可迁移、可解释的新方法。
evals.expected_output: The agent should explicitly notify the user that it is entering the grant proposal deep-research workflow, create or describe the guide-first deep-research artifacts, infer 3 candidate directions, score them with the agreed priorities, select one best direction, label inferred content as needing human confirmation, and mention literature_route_status plus MERGED_CORE_PAPERS authority after convergence.

evals.name: guide_with_keywords_broad_search_plan
evals.prompt: 根据下面项目指南和关键词，帮我做科研申请书参考稿。指南强调绿色低碳、智能制造、数据驱动建模和工业过程优化。关键词：多模态工业数据、数字孪生、节能优化、可解释机器学习。请按深研档推进，不要只做普通网页检索。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger the skill, state it will use deep-research mode rather than quick search, produce a broad-search-then-converge plan with keyword expansion, candidate pool targets (about 80-120 guide-first), core paper and evidence-card thresholds, dual-route preflight fields, and describe required intermediate artifacts before drafting.

evals.name: existing_direction_with_background
evals.prompt: 我已有大致方向：面向老年慢病管理的多源健康数据融合与个体化风险预测。研究背景是可穿戴设备和基层医疗数据越来越多，但跨源异构、缺失和可解释性不足。研究目的是形成可解释的风险预测和干预建议方法。请帮我生成一版科研申请书参考稿。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger or propose the skill, use the clearer-direction path with a 50-80 candidate literature target, still generate or request the standard intermediate artifacts, keep budget/team/ethics as placeholders, plan one complete best-direction draft plus concept cards only if alternative directions are useful, and keep MERGED_CORE_PAPERS as post-convergence authority.

evals.name: secondary_provider_missing_primary_only_fallback
evals.prompt: 请按双路由文献发现启动申报书深研。我没有配置任何第二检索引擎或 Grok CLI。请说明你将如何处理 secondary 路由，并继续完成主路由。
evals.expected_output: The agent should treat secondary discovery as optional, set or describe selected_mode=primary_only with an explicit fallback_reason, refuse to block on missing secondary provider/CLI/auth/model/network, continue primary discovery to MERGED_CORE_PAPERS or primary-final core list, and keep the kit usable with adapters unset.

evals.name: priority_fulltext_oa_first_and_manual_queue
evals.prompt: 核心文献已经收敛。请从合并核心中选择 3 到 8 篇优先全文，说明合法 OA-first 获取步骤，并说明获取失败时如何记录。
evals.expected_output: The agent should select 3-8 priority papers from MERGED_CORE_PAPERS, attempt only lawful OA/institutional/author-manuscript/library routes, log every attempt in fulltext_acquisition.csv, open FULLTEXT_MANUAL_ACTION_REQUIRED when access fails, deep-read only readable full text, and never describe paywall bypass.

evals.name: html_delivery_gate_for_conclusions
evals.prompt: 我需要把本轮深研结论交付给合作者阅读。请说明最终 HTML 交付门禁和必需页面，并确认 Markdown 是否仍是权威源。
evals.expected_output: The agent should require a readable UTF-8 HTML entry page plus 3-8 decision-critical pages for conclusion-bearing work, complete html_delivery_checklist, include evidence-boundary text, responsive/print-friendly navigation, local-link checks, and state that Markdown/structured artifacts remain authoritative.

evals.name: research_methods_routing_for_integrity
evals.prompt: 这篇稿子还需要系统评价协议检查和引用完整性审查，不只是申报书深研。请告诉我应走哪条技能入口。
evals.expected_output: The agent should keep proposal deep-research in proposal-research, route systematic-review, integrity, peer-review, and reproducibility tasks through skills/research-methods as a thin first-party router with local offline templates, treat the full Academic Research Skills suite as optional external material that is not bundled or auto-installed, and still point to docs/START_HERE.html.
